emi.title: Home Loan EMI Calculator India | Calculate Mortgage EMI | 360Ghar
emi.description: Calculate your Home Loan EMI instantly with 360Ghar's free EMI Calculator. Plan your budget, check monthly installments, and view amortization schedule for properties in Gurugram & India.
emi.keywords: home loan EMI calculator India, housing loan calculator, mortgage calculator India, loan repayment schedule, SBI home loan EMI, HDFC home loan EMI, real estate finance tool, 360ghar financial tools
emi.headingDesc: Use our comprehensive EMI calculator to plan your home loan better. Get instant calculations for monthly installments, total interest, and total payment.
emi.whatIsEmiDesc: EMI (Equated Monthly Installment) is a fixed payment amount made by a borrower to a lender at a specified date each calendar month. It consists of both principal and interest components.
emi.tipCreditScore: Maintain a good credit score for better interest rates
emi.tipShorterTenure: Choose a shorter tenure to save on interest
emi.tipPrepayments: Make prepayments when possible to reduce interest burden
emi.ctaTitle: Ready to Find Your Dream Home?
emi.ctaDesc: Explore our wide range of properties and use our EMI calculator to plan your finances better.

areaConverter.title: Land Area Converter India | Sq Ft, Gaj, Bigha, Acre Converter | 360Ghar
areaConverter.description: Convert land area units instantly. Support for Sq Ft, Sq Yard (Gaj), Bigha, Acre, Hectare, Guntha, and more. Essential tool for buying land or plots in India.
areaConverter.keywords: land area converter India, sq ft to gaj converter, bigha to sq ft, acre to hectare converter, plot size converter, real estate unit converter, 360ghar tools, land measurement India
areaConverter.headingDesc: Compare properties easily by converting between local and standard measurement units.

areaCalculator.title: Carpet Area Calculator India | RERA Super Built-up vs Carpet Area | 360Ghar
areaCalculator.description: Calculate actual Carpet Area from Super Built-up Area using our RERA-compliant calculator. Understand loading factor and usable space for properties in Gurugram and Delhi NCR.
areaCalculator.keywords: carpet area calculator India, super built up area vs carpet area, RERA area calculator, loading factor calculator, apartment area calculator, flat size calculator, 360ghar tools
areaCalculator.carpetDesc: This is the actual area you can use within the walls.
areaCalculator.carpetAreaDesc: The area enclosed within the walls, actual usable floor area. According to RERA, it excludes external walls, service shafts, balconies, and open terraces.
areaCalculator.builtUpAreaDesc: Carpet Area + Area of walls + Area of balconies. This is typically 10-15% more than the carpet area.
areaCalculator.superBuiltUpAreaDesc: Built-up Area + Proportionate share of common areas (lobby, lifts, stairs, amenities). This is what you usually pay for.

loanEligibility.title: Home Loan Eligibility Calculator India | Check Max Loan Amount | 360Ghar
loanEligibility.description: Check your Home Loan Eligibility instantly. Calculate the maximum loan amount you can get based on your salary, existing EMIs, and tenure. Plan your home purchase budget.
loanEligibility.keywords: home loan eligibility calculator India, how much home loan can I get, housing loan eligibility check, salary based home loan calculator, 360ghar financial tools
loanEligibility.estimateNote: * This is an estimate based on standard bank norms (FOIR). Actual eligibility may vary based on credit score, age, and bank policies.

capitalGains.title: Capital Gains Tax Calculator India | Property LTCG & STCG Calculator | 360Ghar
capitalGains.description: Calculate Capital Gains Tax on property sale in India. Check Long Term (LTCG) and Short Term (STCG) tax liability with indexation benefits. Plan your property sale tax efficiently.
capitalGains.keywords: capital gains tax calculator property India, LTCG on property, STCG on property, property sale tax calculator, indexation benefit calculator, income tax on property sale, 360ghar tax tools
capitalGains.indexedCostNote: (Purchase Price adjusted for inflation using CII)
capitalGains.shortTermTaxNote: Short term gains are added to your total income and taxed as per your slab.
capitalGains.exemptionsDesc: You can save tax on Long Term Capital Gains by reinvesting the gain amount into another residential property within:
capitalGains.exemptionBonds: Or by investing in 54EC Capital Gain Bonds (max ₹50 Lakhs) within 6 months.

propertyChecklist.title: Property Documents Checklist India | Home Buying Legal Checklist | 360Ghar
propertyChecklist.description: Essential document checklist for buying property in India. Ensure you have all legal papers: Title Deed, EC, Occupancy Certificate, etc. Verified by 360Ghar experts.
propertyChecklist.keywords: property document checklist India, documents for buying flat, home loan documents list, property legal verification checklist, real estate documents India, 360ghar guide
propertyChecklist.docTitleDeedDesc: Verify the seller has clear ownership of the property.
propertyChecklist.docEncumbranceDesc: Ensures the property is free from legal dues or mortgages.
propertyChecklist.docNAOrderDesc: Required if buying land to build a home.
propertyChecklist.docBuildingPlanDesc: Check if the building plan is approved by the local municipal authority.
propertyChecklist.docCompletionDesc: Proof that the building is constructed according to approved plans and is ready for habitation.
propertyChecklist.docPropertyTaxDesc: Ensure all previous property taxes have been paid by the seller.
propertyChecklist.docKhataDesc: Proof that the property is registered in the municipal records.
propertyChecklist.docNocBankDesc: If the seller had a loan, ensure they have a No Objection Certificate from the bank.
propertyChecklist.docNocSocietyDesc: Required for transferring the share certificate in housing societies.
propertyChecklist.docSaleAgreementDesc: Drafted on stamp paper, outlining terms and conditions of the sale.
propertyChecklist.docStampDutyDesc: Proof of stamp duty payment to the government.
propertyChecklist.docRegistrationDesc: Final proof of transaction registration with the sub-registrar.
propertyChecklist.docPossessionDesc: Issued by the builder/seller when handing over keys.
propertyChecklist.noteDesc: This checklist is for general guidance only. Property laws vary by state in India. It is highly recommended to consult a property lawyer for legal verification of documents before making a purchase.

vastu.heroDesc: Upload your floor plan and receive a comprehensive Vastu Shastra analysis with personalized recommendations and practical remedies.
vastu.notesPlaceholder: Any specific concerns about your property? E.g., 'Planning kitchen renovation', 'Health issues in family', 'Want to improve prosperity'...

vastu.errorTimeoutMsg: The analysis is taking longer than expected. This may be due to high demand or a complex floor plan.
vastu.errorNetworkMsg: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your internet connection and try again.
vastu.errorFileSize: The image file is too large. Please upload an image smaller than 5MB.

vastu.suggestionNetwork3: Disable any VPN or proxy that might be blocking the connection
vastu.suggestionTimeout1: Try uploading a smaller or simpler floor plan image
vastu.suggestionTimeout2: Ensure the image is clear and well-lit

vastu.stepReportDesc: Receive detailed Vastu analysis with score and practical remedies
vastu.whatIsVastuDesc: Vastu Shastra is an ancient Indian science of architecture and design that harmonizes the five elements of nature - Earth, Water, Fire, Air, and Space - with your living space. It provides guidelines for the layout and positioning of rooms to enhance positive energy flow.
vastu.vastuTip1: Entrance facing North or East brings prosperity
vastu.vastuTip2: Kitchen in South-East for health and wealth
vastu.vastuTip3: Master bedroom in South-West for stability
vastu.ctaDesc: Explore our curated collection of properties with 360° virtual tours. Find your perfect home with confidence.
vastu.dragDrop: Drag and drop your floor plan image here
vastu.validationFileType: Invalid file type. Please upload JPEG, PNG, or WebP images only.
vastu.validationFileSize: File too large. Maximum size is {{max}}MB.
vastu.northHint: Don't know the direction? Stand at the center of your house with a compass app.
vastu.dirTopDesc: North is at the top of the image
vastu.dirRightDesc: North is to the right of the image
vastu.dirBottomDesc: North is at the bottom of the image
vastu.dirLeftDesc: North is to the left of the image
vastu.notSure: I'm not sure - Let AI detect
vastu.loadingAnalyzingDesc: Our AI is examining your floor plan layout, identifying rooms and spaces...
vastu.loadingGeneratingDesc: Applying Vastu Shastra principles and preparing your personalized analysis...
vastu.scoreDescExcellent: Your property follows most Vastu principles excellently!
vastu.scoreDescGood: Your property has good Vastu compliance with minor improvements needed.
vastu.scoreDescNeedsImprovement: Several Vastu corrections recommended for better energy flow.
vastu.scoreDescPoor: Significant Vastu remedies recommended for this property.
vastu.confidenceNote: This score may be less reliable due to image quality or unclear floor plan layout.
vastu.reportCopyFailed: Failed to copy. Please try selecting and copying manually.
vastu.pdfFailed: Failed to generate PDF. Please try printing instead.
vastu.warningNotFloorPlan: Image May Not Be a Floor Plan
vastu.notFloorPlanMsg: This image may not be a floor plan.
vastu.notFloorPlanNote: The analysis results should be interpreted with caution.
vastu.compassDetected: Compass/North indicator detected in floor plan
